Description: Monthly GP appointment statistics: status, mode, HCP type, time from booking to appointment, consultation duration, appointment category
Relevance to Wait Time App: CRITICAL — primary source of appointment volume and wait time metrics
Key Fields: Appointment date, days waited, practice code, appointment status, mode (face-to-face/telephone/online), HCP type

Description: Annual survey of ~800k patients covering ease of getting appointments, satisfaction, access, overall experience
Relevance to Wait Time App: CRITICAL — subjective wait experience and access difficulty ratings
Key Fields: Ease of getting appointment (%), satisfaction (%), experience making appointment, opening hours satisfaction

Dataset Name: Patients Registered at a GP Practice
Description: Monthly snapshot of registered patient list sizes by practice, age/sex breakdown
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — measures demand (patients per practice); denominator for capacity ratios
Key Fields: Practice code, total patients, age/sex breakdown, PCN, ICB

Description: Monthly FTE and headcount for GPs, nurses, DPC, admin staff per practice
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — supply side: patients-per-GP ratio is key wait time predictor
Key Fields: Practice code, GP FTE, nurse FTE, DPC FTE, admin FTE, headcount

Description: GP practice addresses, postcodes, phone numbers, open/close status, parent organisations
Access Method: Open download via ODS Data Search & Export
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — core location reference for mapping and distance calculations
Key Fields: Practice code, name, address, postcode, phone, status, ICB code, open date, close date

Dataset Name: Directory of Healthcare Services (Service Search) API v3
Description: Search for GPs, pharmacies, urgent care, dentists, hospitals by location; services offered, opening hours
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — find alternative care options near user; opening hours; services offered
Key Fields: Service name, type, address, postcode, lat/long, opening hours, services, contact details

Description: Inspection ratings (Outstanding/Good/Requires Improvement/Inadequate) across 5 key questions for every GP practice
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — quality signal helps users make informed choice when redirecting
Key Fields: Practice name, CQC location ID, overall rating, safe, effective, caring, responsive, well-led ratings, inspection date
Joinable Via: CQC location ID (linkable to ODS code)

Description: 150+ practice-level indicators: deprivation, life expectancy, QOF, disease prevalence, cancer screening, patient satisfaction
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — population health context; disease burden predicts appointment demand
Key Fields: Practice code, indicator ID, value, count, denominator, confidence intervals

Description: Deprivation scores and ranks for 32,844 LSOAs in England across 7 domains (income, employment, health, education, crime, housing, environment)
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — deprivation strongly correlates with GP access difficulty and health need
Key Fields: LSOA code, IMD score, IMD rank, IMD decile, domain scores

Description: Lookup table: every UK postcode to LSOA, MSOA, local authority, ward, constituency, lat/long, rural/urban classification
Access Method: Open download from ONS Geography Portal
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — essential linkage: converts practice postcodes to LSOA for joining with IMD and census data
Key Fields: Postcode, LSOA, MSOA, LAD, lat, long, rural/urban

Description: Every prescription item dispensed in community in England, by practice, monthly
Access Method: Open download from NHSBSA Open Data Portal
Relevance to Wait Time App: LOW-MEDIUM — prescribing volume as proxy for practice workload; antibiotic prescribing patterns
Key Fields: Practice code, BNF code, items, quantity, actual cost

Description: Curated prescribing analysis: dashboards, alerts, practice comparisons, measure definitions
Relevance to Wait Time App: LOW-MEDIUM — ready-made prescribing analytics; saves processing EPD raw data
Key Fields: Practice code, measure ID, value, percentile, numerator, denominator

Description: Search for free slots and book appointments across NHS services (initially 111 to UTC, expanding)
Relevance to Wait Time App: CRITICAL (if accessible) — real-time slot availability; but restricted access
Key Fields: Slot start/end, service, practitioner, booking status

Description: Book, read, amend, cancel appointments at GP practices via FHIR API
Access Method: Restricted — requires NHS onboarding + practice consent
Relevance to Wait Time App: CRITICAL (if accessible) — real-time practice appointment data; highly restricted
Key Fields: Slot, schedule, appointment status, practitioner, location

Description: Practice-level appointment data dashboard with detailed breakdowns of scheduled activity
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH (reference only) — richer than public data but not programmatically accessible
Key Fields: Appointment metrics by practice

Description: Search 160+ service types from UEC Directory of Services + NHS website data; pharmacies, UTC, mental health, social care
Access Method: Widget embed (free); full API is internal
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — alternative care routing when GP wait is long
Key Fields: Service name, type, address, distance, opening hours

Dataset Name: Register with a GP Surgery API
Description: Allows patients to register with a GP practice online
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — enables in-app GP registration for practices with shorter waits
Key Fields: Registration form fields

Description: Central hub linking workforce, appointments, patient experience, prescribing data at practice level
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — single entry point to multiple practice-level datasets
Key Fields: Links to workforce, appointments, patient experience datasets

Description: Central catalogue of NHS England open datasets across all domains
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — discovery tool for additional datasets
Key Fields: Various

Dataset Name: NHS Hack Day Datasets & APIs List
Description: Curated community list of NHS open data sources and APIs for health tech developers
Relevance to Wait Time App: REFERENCE — excellent starting point for discovering data sources
Key Fields: Links to datasets and APIs

Dataset Name: Urgent and Emergency Care CQI API
Description: Submit and query 111/999 triage data for quality monitoring; call outcome data
Relevance to Wait Time App: LOW — useful for understanding 111 overflow to GP but restricted access
Key Fields: Triage pathway, disposition, call duration

Description: Central UK open data portal containing ~25k datasets; search for NHS/health datasets
Relevance to Wait Time App: REFERENCE — supplementary discovery
Key Fields: Various

Description: Quick lookup: enter postcode, get LSOA and full deprivation data
Relevance to Wait Time App: UTILITY — rapid prototyping tool for deprivation lookups
Key Fields: Postcode, LSOA, IMD rank, decile, score

Description: R package wrapping ONS API: get postcode-to-LSOA-to-IMD lookups programmatically
Relevance to Wait Time App: UTILITY — useful for building data pipelines in R
Key Fields: Postcode, LSOA, IMD data

Dataset Name: House of Commons Library — GPs by Constituency
Description: GP practice counts, list sizes, workforce mapped to parliamentary constituencies
Relevance to Wait Time App: LOW — useful for political/policy context but not granular enough for app
Key Fields: Constituency, practice count, list size, GP FTE

Dataset Name: Organisation Data Terminology FHIR R4 API
Description: RECOMMENDED ODS API: practice codes, names, addresses (incl UPRN), postcodes, roles, open/close dates, geographic boundaries (LSOA, ICB, LA, Region, Constituency)
Access Method: API key (application-restricted) — register at NHS Developer Hub
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — programmatic replacement for epraccur CSV; supports geo-search; 5000 req/5min rate limit
Key Fields: ODS code, name, address, postcode, UPRN, roles, relationships, status, LSOA, ICB

Description: Practice-level disease prevalence, achievement rates, personalised care adjustment across cardiovascular, respiratory, mental health, musculoskeletal domains. 6188 practices (97.6% coverage)
Access Method: Open download + interactive database at qof.digital.nhs.uk
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — disease prevalence predicts demand; high chronic disease burden = longer waits
Key Fields: Practice code, indicator, prevalence, achievement %, exception rate

Dataset Name: GP Practice Catchment Area KML Files
Description: Catchment area boundary polygons for GP practices across England; submitted via eDEC annual collection
Access Method: Open download from NHS England Data Catalogue
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — shows which areas each practice serves; essential for 'am I in catchment?' feature
Key Fields: ODS code, boundary polygon coordinates

Dataset Name: TfL PTAL Data (Public Transport Accessibility Level)
Description: PTAL scores 0-6b for every 100m grid cell in Greater London; also aggregated at LSOA level. Based on walk time to stops, service frequency, reliability
Access Method: Open download from TfL GIS Open Data Hub
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH (London only) — enables travel-time-weighted GP recommendations
Key Fields: Grid ref, PTAL score, LSOA code (aggregated version), mean/max/min PTAL

Description: Point-to-point journey planning across all London transport modes; calculates actual travel times
Access Method: Free API key — register at api-portal.tfl.gov.uk
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH (London only) — calculate actual travel time from user to each nearby GP
Key Fields: Origin, destination, journey time, modes, steps

Description: LSOA-level travel times to GP surgeries, hospitals, food stores by public transport, walking, cycling, car. % population reaching GP within 15/30 mins
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — pre-computed GP accessibility by LSOA; but data is 2019 and won't update
Key Fields: LSOA code, travel time to GP (mins), % within 15/30 mins, by mode

Description: All NHS community pharmacies and appliance contractors in England: ODS code, name, address, postcode, LPC area
Access Method: Open download from NHSBSA Open Data Portal
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — pharmacies as alternative for minor ailments; redirect users from GP
Key Fields: Pharmacy ODS code, name, address, postcode, HWB area

Dataset Name: Integrated Urgent Care Aggregate Data (IUC ADC / NHS 111)
Description: 111 call volumes, dispositions (recommended to primary care, A&E, ambulance), call answer times, abandonment rates. Proxy for GP overflow demand
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — high 'recommended to primary care' volume signals GP capacity stress
Key Fields: Calls offered, answered, abandoned, dispositions by type, contract area

Description: Boundary polygons for all 33,755 LSOAs in England and Wales; multiple generalisation levels (full, generalised, super-generalised)
Access Method: Open download from ONS Open Geography Portal
Relevance to Wait Time App: HIGH — essential for mapping; choropleth visualisation of wait times by area
Key Fields: LSOA code + boundary geometry

Dataset Name: Booking and Referral Standard (BaRS) FHIR API
Description: Modern replacement for NHS Booking FHIR API; cross-setting booking (111→ED, 111→GP hubs); FHIR UK Core R4
Relevance to Wait Time App: CRITICAL (if accessible) — newest booking standard; but same access restrictions as GP Connect
Key Fields: Booking/referral data

Description: Curated dashboard combining NHS data across 8 domains: access, activity, continuity, coordination, patient experience, funding, workforce, quality
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — excellent contextual reference; pre-analysed trends
Key Fields: Multi-source composite metrics

Dataset Name: ICB Access to General Practice Dashboard
Description: Interactive dashboard showing access metrics at ICB level; combines appointment and patient experience data
Relevance to Wait Time App: MEDIUM — pre-built access visualisation at ICB level
Key Fields: Access composite indicators

Description: Open source tool mapping GP appointment waits by ICB using NHS England appointment data; good reference implementation
Relevance to Wait Time App: REFERENCE — existing open source implementation to learn from
Key Fields: Maps ICB wait data

Description: Compartment models for waitlist demand/capacity prediction; R-based pipeline for analysing referral-to-treatment data
Relevance to Wait Time App: REFERENCE — demand/capacity modelling methodology
Key Fields: Waitlist compartment models

Description: Python wrapper for Fingertips API; programmatic access to all 150+ GP practice indicators
Relevance to Wait Time App: UTILITY — easiest way to pull Fingertips data into Python pipelines
Key Fields: Practice code, indicator data
